description: Quality assurance workflow: Validate AI-generated code meets SDLC standards before commit

syntax_validation.input: Validate AI-generated code has no syntax errors and follows Python best practices
syntax_validation.expected_result: PASS - Code has valid syntax and no PEP 8 violations

functionality_testing.input: Execute comprehensive functionality tests for all required task types
functionality_testing.expected_result: PASS - All task types (documentation, refactor, test-suite) work correctly

security_scan.input: Scan AI-generated code for security vulnerabilities and unsafe practices

documentation_completeness.input: Verify AI-generated code has complete documentation including docstrings, comments, and usage examples

performance_analysis.input: Analyze AI-generated code for performance characteristics and optimization opportunities

code_review_preparation.input: Generate comprehensive code review documentation including changes, test results, and quality metrics
code_review_preparation.expected_result: PASS - Complete code review package generated

commit_preparation.input: Prepare commit message and documentation for AI-generated code that passed all quality gates
commit_preparation.expected_result: PASS - Commit-ready package with proper documentation

quality_gate_policy.MANDATORY: Must pass for code to be approved
